Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendants' Food, Wine & More, Inc., Edith Wong and Robbin Jew's demurrer to the complaint is overruled. Defendants' sole argument that the person who filed this lawsuit lacks capacity to sue on behalf of plaintiff necessarily rests on matters neither alleged in the complaint nor judicially noticeable. Therefore, the demurrer lacks merit since it is not directed to the allegations in the complaint, but rather is based on purported facts that are not alleged in the complaint. Defendant's argument necessarily must be made in an evidentiary context. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
